jobDistinction.legacyPausedAuditJob: Broad website issue discovery plus small automatic fixes/upgrades; currently paused.
jobDistinction.currentRemediationJob: Backlog-driven remediation, optimization, and upgrade loop based on .hermes/remediation-backlog.md.

nonOverlapPolicy: If the previous remediation run is still active, skip the current tick instead of starting another fix run.

freshAuditPolicy.action: Run comprehensive audit, update remediation-backlog.md with newly discovered or reprioritized issues, then continue remediation.

lastHealthyBaseline.tests: Operation Task service/client regressions passed: 3 tests
lastHealthyBaseline.production: vcontrolhub-next and vcontrolhub-ssh-ws restarted active; /api/status healthy; operation task/requests/deployment probes returned 401/307/200; recent service logs clean

lastRun.target: P6 durable command/deployment background-worker architecture: operator-visible worker ownership/heartbeat diagnostics in Task Center
lastRun.summary: Added workerId/workerHeartbeatAt metadata to Operation Task aggregation for command and deployment-backed tasks, rendered worker badges and heartbeat context in the Operation Tasks UI, and added service/client regressions so operators can see which in-process worker owns running command/deployment work.
validation: systemctl restart vcontrolhub-next.service vcontrolhub-ssh-ws.service succeeded and both services active
recent production logs checked with no error/warn matches
lastRun.deployment: Production services restarted and smoke/route probes passed.
lastRun.nextTarget: P6 durable command/deployment background-worker architecture: richer restart-surviving queue claim diagnostics/reconciliation history beyond Task Center worker ownership display.

runPolicy.batchSize: coherent deployable batch; may be larger for high-value architecture/performance/availability/user-experience improvements if fully verified
